name: mongodb
description: Protects MongoDB databases from destructive AI operations

smartRules.name: shield:mongodb:block-drop-database
smartRules.reason: dropDatabase is irreversible — blocked by MongoDB shield

smartRules.name: shield:mongodb:block-drop-collection
smartRules.reason: Collection drop is irreversible — blocked by MongoDB shield

smartRules.name: shield:mongodb:block-delete-many-empty-filter
smartRules.reason: deleteMany({}) with empty filter wipes the entire collection — blocked by MongoDB shield

smartRules.name: shield:mongodb:review-drop-index
smartRules.reason: Index drops affect query performance and require human approval (MongoDB shield)
